_note: The machine-readable mirror of contracts/drape_layer.ct's DrapeLayer table (G3, engine-viewport rung). This is the file strata and valley VENDOR — a checked-in copy, byte-identical to this one, with a sha256 note in the vendoring test/lint pointing back here. Edit drape_layer.ct and this file together; a mismatch between them is a bug in this repo, not a cross-repo one.
modeNote: mode ids mirror the retired render.metal viewMode enum (0 shaded, 1 moisture, 2 temperature, 3 flow, 4 slope, 5 biome); province rides 5 too (a palette, not a ramp, same idiom as biome's colormap.png).
flowRawNote: flow.exr is written RAW (BakeManifest.swift's EXRWriter.writeR32, no min/max normalize), so its GPU sample is the PHYSICAL value directly, not a 0..1 fraction. encMin/encMax = [0,1] here is the identity pass-through valley's data_scale/data_offset formula needs to turn that raw physical sample straight into view-t (t = raw / viewMax) — preserved verbatim from preview_terrain.gd's own LAYERS table (the behavioral truth), not smoothed into something that reads cleaner but drifts from what ships.
probeErrors: err no preview mesh worn (preview_mesh <dir> first)
err probe (<x>, <z>) outside the world (max <half>m from center)
err layer file missing: <file> (re-export from Strata)
